Full dataset saved to env['data_1'] for use in execute_python.\nPreview:\n[{\"track_id\": 4122, \"title\": \"Street Hype\", \"artist\": \"Brucqe Maginnis\"}, {\"track_id\": 4628, \"title\": \"Street Hype - Groove City\", \"artist\": \"Bruce Maginnis\"}, {\"track_id\": 14080, \"title\": \"011-Street Hype\", \"artist\": \"Bruce Maginnis\"}]"

args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist FROM tracks WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE '%street hype%' OR LOWER(artist) LIKE '%brucqe maginnis%'

val_args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist FROM tracks WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE '%street hype%' OR LOWER(artist) LIKE '%brucqe maginnis%'

result.preview: "Query successful. Full dataset saved to env['data_2'] for use in execute_python.\nPreview:\n[{\"store\": \"iTunes\", \"total_revenue\": 505.61}, {\"store\": \"Amazon Music\", \"total_revenue\": 304.13}, {\"store\": \"Apple Music\", \"total_revenue\": 116.20000000000002}]"

args.query: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) as total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

val_args.query: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) as total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
